---
title: "Home"
pagetitle: "Hugo Trad"
description: "Behavioural scientist working on the cognitive psychology of administrative complexity. Assistant Professor at Africa Business School, UM6P."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="../en/" class="is-active">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--editorial">
  <section class="hero hero--editorial">
    <header class="hero__top">
      <figure class="hero__figure">
        <img src="../assets/headshot-square.jpg" alt="Hugo Trad" class="hero__photo hero__photo--portrait">
      </figure>
      <div class="hero__intro">
        <p class="hero__location"><span>Rabat</span><i class="hero__loc-dot" aria-hidden="true"></i><span class="hero__loc-soft">Paris</span></p>
        <h1 class="hero__name">Hugo Trad</h1>
        <p class="hero__role">
          Assistant Professor of Behavioural Science<br>
          <span class="hero__role-soft">Africa Business School · Université Mohammed VI Polytechnique</span><br>
          <span class="hero__role-soft">PhD, Institut Jean Nicod · École normale supérieure, 2024</span>
        </p>
      </div>
    </header>

    <p class="hero__lede">
      I study the cognitive psychology of administrative complexity — how organizations accumulate friction that generates costs for individuals and institutions alike, and how to design audits and tools that bring it back down.
    </p>

    <nav class="hero__links" aria-label="Profiles">
      <a href="mailto:hugo.trad@um6p.ma"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i><span>Email</span></a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=lqobKZ0AAAAJ"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i><span>Scholar</span></a>
      <a href="https://github.com/hdtrad"><i class="bi bi-github"></i><span>GitHub</span></a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/hugo-trad-phd-90697897/"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i><span>LinkedIn</span></a>
      <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/hugotrad.bsky.social"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i><span>Bluesky</span></a>
      <a href="https://x.com/hugo_trad"><i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i><span>X</span></a>
    </nav>
  </section>

  <ul class="tiles tiles--numbered">
    <li>
      <span class="tiles__num">01</span>
      <h3><a href="research.html">Research</a></h3>
      <p>Three working papers on cognitive bias, the psychology of administrative burden, and audit design.</p>
      <span class="tiles__cue">Three threads · 3 papers in prep →</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tiles__num">02</span>
      <h3><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></h3>
      <p>An open audit platform and a methodology guide built for practitioners.</p>
      <span class="tiles__cue">2 open-source artefacts →</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tiles__num">03</span>
      <h3><a href="teaching.html">Teaching</a></h3>
      <p>Doctoral, master, and executive courses in experimental methods and applied behavioural science.</p>
      <span class="tiles__cue">2 active · 2 planned →</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tiles__num">04</span>
      <h3><a href="cv.html">Curriculum Vitae</a></h3>
      <p>Education, positions, advisory work. Full CV as PDF on request.</p>
      <span class="tiles__cue">Download PDF →</span>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <aside class="lockup" aria-label="Affiliation">
    <span class="lockup__label">Affiliated with</span>
    <img src="../assets/logos/um6p-abs.png" alt="Africa Business School · Université Mohammed VI Polytechnique">
  </aside>
</main>
```
